patterns.name: Cinematic Advertising
patterns.description: High contrast dramatic lighting used in professional branding.
patterns.prompt_injection: Cinematic lighting setup, crisp rim light defining the silhouette against background, soft key light highlighting the subject, dramatic volumetric atmosphere.

patterns.name: Clean Studio
patterns.description: Bright, even lighting for clear product/subject visibility.
patterns.prompt_injection: Professional studio lighting setup, bright even illumination, softbox fill light, subtle shadows, clean premium aesthetic preserving natural skin tones.

patterns.name: Neon Tech Environment
patterns.prompt_injection: Vibrant neon lighting, contrasting cool and warm neon accents, specular highlights on surfaces, modern technological glow.
